summary: V3 Article Management System testing completed. All 8 features tested - Backend APIs (V3 categories, V3 kits, quote stats) and Frontend (simplified ServiceItemSelector, registration without business_type, settings with business_type) all working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: V3 Categories API correctly returns 10 categories with 239 total items
V3 Kits API correctly returns 8 predefined kits
Quote stats/usage API at /api/quotes/stats/usage returns trial limit info
ServiceItemSelector component uses simplified Category → Article structure (no subcategories)
Both Invoice and Quote forms use the same ServiceItemSelector component
Registration form correctly excludes business_type field
Settings page correctly includes business_type selector under 'Type d'activité'
Quote creation properly checks trial limits via check_quote_permission()
context_for_next_testing_agent: V3 Article Management System fully implemented and tested. Categories API returns 10 categories with 239 items. Kits API returns 8 kits. ServiceItemSelector uses simplified Category → Article structure without subcategories. Registration form excludes business_type (defaults to 'general'). Settings page includes business_type selector.

V3 category API returns 10 categories wi.details: GET /api/v3/categories returns 10 categories, GET /api/v3/categories/with-items returns 239 total items

V3 kits API returns 8 kits.details: GET /api/v3/kits returns 8 predefined kits with items

Quote stats usage API returns proper tri.details: GET /api/quotes/stats/usage returns quote_count, quote_limit, can_create, trial_status

Invoice form page uses simplified Servic.details: Invoice form at /factures/new shows Category → Article selection without subcategory step

Quote form page uses the same simplified.details: Quote form at /devis/new shows same Category → Article selection with 10 categories and 239 items

Registration form does NOT have business.details: Registration form shows Name, Phone, Company, Address, Email, Password - NO business_type field

Settings page HAS business_type selector.details: Settings page at /parametres shows 'Type d'activité' section with business_type dropdown

Quote creation requires trial limit chec.details: POST /api/quotes calls check_quote_permission() which enforces trial limits

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are real - no mocking

rca_of_the_issue: N/A - No issues found. All V3 Article Management features working correctly.
